name: atlas-profiles
description: Profile-specific eval cases for public metadata defaults, explicit filters, and profile safety workflows.

cases.query: public default profile local-first Atlas README visibility audience purpose
cases.scenario: default public profile retrieves public overview metadata
cases.claim: Atlas retrieves evidence matched to maintainer, consumer, operator, and agent-integrator perspectives.
cases.whyItMatters: Different roles need different evidence from the same corpus.
cases.expectedBehavior: Retrieve the expected source paths and terms while satisfying any negative, diagnostic, confidence, and hit-count expectations.

cases.expectedBehavior: Retrieve the expected source paths and terms while satisfying any negative, diagnostic, confidence, and hit-count expectations.
